name: Yuuki Conan
description: Former Japanese-Indonesian soccer player • programmer • lead developer at Keyza Richi.

name: Nathania Anneta Wayak Payong
description:
Nathania Anneta, exclusively known as Nia or Neta, is a Yuuki’s new assistant developer, actress and model that often helps Yuuki to test new features in Lyra before they’re released to the public.

In addition to her work as a developer, Nia is also known for her captivating performances and stunning looks when she become the photogenic champion of Kediri Regency in 2025. With her unique blend of technical expertise and creative talent, Nia is a valuable asset to the Keyza Richi team and a rising star in the entertainment industry.

name: Fransiska Paramitha Hendrawan
description:
Caca is a Sagittarius woman with a restless soul and a heart that is always searching for meaning beyond the ordinary. She loves adventures that take her to unfamiliar places, whether it is hiking through quiet mountains, exploring hidden cafés in busy cities, or spending peaceful evenings under the stars. Alongside her adventurous spirit, Caca is deeply drawn to spiritual activities that help her feel connected to herself and the world around her. Photography is another part of her identity; through her camera lens, she captures emotions, fleeting moments, and the beauty that most people overlook. Her free-spirited personality makes her both inspiring and unpredictable, leaving a memorable impression wherever she goes.

Her relationship with Yuuki is intense, passionate, and often feels like a roller coaster ride filled with highs and lows. There are moments when they laugh endlessly together and feel completely inseparable, but there are also times when misunderstandings and strong emotions create distance between them.

Despite the turbulence, their connection remains difficult to break because both of them share a deep emotional bond and an unspoken understanding of each other’s hearts. Like two storms colliding in the same sky, Caca and Yuuki continue to challenge, heal, and change one another in ways neither of them fully expected.

name: Lusiana Aristianty Kusuma Dewi
description:
~ note: this is just a zodiac joke.
An Aquarius woman who is actually gentle and a little shy on the outside, relies on her powers of observation to think logically over feelings based on facts. She is friends with Jessica Anastasya.
---

Her story is begin in 2025, when Lusiana joined the English Club at her school, where she quickly became known for her keen observational skills and logical thinking. Despite her gentle and shy demeanor, Lusiana's ability to analyze situations based on facts rather than emotions has made her a valuable member of the club and a trusted friend to Jessica Anastasya.

Also, Lusiana has contributed to Lyra Aura with TopBar and Snackbar, helping to enhance the user experience and create a more engaging website for visitors. This significantly improved the website's functionality and user interface, as before these elements were introduced, developer often use old toast notification which is less interactive and visually appealing.

name: Ercila Mai Asherayuku
description:
Graphic designer

An expert in drawing, Ercila won first place in the SDN Pare 2 drawing contest in 2022. Some things are meant to be felt; she's express it deeply, quietly, and completely.

Ercila was included in keyzarichi.org as a Storyteller member because of her love story with Yuuki, a main developer of Keyza Richi, which is often associated with the love story between Pisces (Yuuki) and Scorpio (Ercila); described as a love story that is deep, intense, and full of emotional depth. Ercila's presence in the team adds a unique perspective and creative energy that helps bring the website to life with visually stunning graphics and captivating content.

In addition to her work as a graphic designer, Ercila is also known for her quiet and introspective nature, often expressing herself through her art in a way that resonates deeply with others. Her talent and creativity have made her an invaluable member of the keyzarichi.org team, where she contributes her unique perspective and creative energy to help bring the website to life with visually stunning graphics and captivating content.

name: Deandra Aliena Putranto
description:
Ercila’s trusted companion in the world of imagination; Dea helps Ercila transform art into unparalleled creativity. Just enough to keep things interesting.

Deandra was included in keyzarichi.org as a Storyteller member because she has a close friendship with Ercila, and also a 'mediator' in the relationship between Ercila and Yuuki. Despite their problems, Deandra is always there to support and encourage Ercila, helping her navigate the complexities of her relationship with Yuuki and providing a source of comfort and understanding.

In other side, Deandra is also a talented artist in her own right, with a unique perspective and creative energy that helps bring the website to life with visually stunning graphics and captivating content.

name: Crescentia Flos C. P. S.
description:
Ercila’s trusted companion in the world of imagination; Flos helps Ercila transform art into unparalleled creativity.

More about Flos is coming soon... but one thing is for sure, Flos is a talented artist in her own right, with a unique perspective and creative energy that helps bring the website to life with visually stunning graphics and captivating content.
